name: Wild Mushroom Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter and 1 tablespoon olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until very hot and hazelnut in color.
2. Add the mushrooms to the skillet and sauté for 10 seconds.
3. Cover the skillet and continue cooking the mushrooms over high heat for 3 minutes.
4. Uncover the skillet and cook the mushrooms over high heat for an additional 2 to 3 minutes, until they are dry.
5. Add the shallots, herbs, salt, and pepper to the skillet. Cook for an additional 1 minute.
6. Lightly toast the bread slices in a separate toaster or on a stovetop with a dry pan.
7. Arrange the toasted bread slices on a serving plate.
8. Spoon the mushroom mixture onto the toast and sprinkle a little olive oil on top, if desired.
9. Serve immediately.
Nutritional analysis per serving: calories 195; protein 5 gm; carbohydrates 22 gm; fat 10.4 gm; saturated fat 4.3 gm; cholesterol 16 mg; sodium 412 mg.
